# Packrift Packaging Search Vocabulary Crosswalk

A public buyer-language crosswalk built from approved in-stock Packrift catalog tags, mapping packaging search phrases to matching product families, product types, and Packrift product URLs.

Published term pages: 1775
Mapped products: 4852
Families: 13
Product types: 24

Data files:
- https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/search-vocabulary-terms.json
- https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/search-vocabulary-terms.csv
- https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/search-vocabulary-terms.jsonl
- https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/field-dictionary.json
- https://packrift.github.io/packaging-vocabulary/data/stats.json
